panels.description: 0-15% = is acceptable imbalance
panels.title: S3 I/O Imbalance (by Node)

panels.description: A Database should be distributed evenly among nodes. Any node showing >15% imbalance should be investigated.
panels.title: Metadata Partition Balance (by Node)

panels.description: Partitions with 3 copies are fully protected
panels.title: 3x Fully Protected Partitions

panels.description: DB Partitions with 2 copies are functional, but not fully protected
panels.title: Degraded - 2x Protected Partitions

panels.description: DB Partitions with 1 copy are not functional (unprotected) - any PUT operation requiring these partitions will fail.
panels.title: Unprotected Partitions (1x)

panels.description: DB Partitions with no copies are not functional - they are likely orphaned and to be deleted by the system later.
panels.title: Orphaned Partitions (no copies)

panels.description: Occasionally and temporarily some DB partitions may be overprotected (4+ copies). It's not better or worse than 3 copies. It's a temporary state.
panels.title: Overprotected  Partitions (4x+)

panels.description: Checks the partitions protection (number of copies)

result.text: Degraded
Overprotected
Failures Detected - Unprotected
Unknown
Healthy

targets.expr: ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==1) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 1000) + ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==2) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 100) + ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==3) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 1) + ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==0) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 2) + ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==4) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 10)

targets.legendFormat: Total DB Partitions incl. copies (all tables)

panels.description: Checks the partitions

result.text: Normal
Partition count is high. More nodes are required soon.
IMPORTANT: Partition count is very high. Add more nodes.
WARNING: Partition count is extremely high. Add more nodes immediately.

panels.title: Database Partitions Per Node

panels.description: New raft groups added each day. Each raft group has 3 partitions. The actual number of added partitions is 3x of displayed.
panels.title: Daily new partitions added

panels.description:
Attention if Partition Size is above 1.5x the default size (16GB is default split threshold).
Alarm if if Partition Size is above 2x the default size (>32GB).

result.text: Healthy
High partition size - check Metadata Coordination service in System Management UI
Very high partition size - check Metadata Coordination service in System Management UI
Extremely high partition size - immediately Contact Hitachi Vantara Support to resolve this issue

panels.title: Partitions Size Health

panels.description: Partitions may exceed slightly the threshold (1GB) for a short time, but they should not normally continue to grow much above the threshold.
panels.title: Partitions Sizes

panels.description:
A large partition is a partition with a size over 24GB.
Partitions under 50% of the threshold (default is 16GB) are considered "normal", as the partition split could be delayed.
panels.title: History of Large DB Partitions
